title: Generate PDFs in a Next.js app
summary: Implement PDF generation using @react-pdf/renderer for structured documents (invoices, reports) or Puppeteer/html-pdf-node for HTML-to-PDF, with streaming download endpoints.
declaration:
I will set up PDF generation for your Next.js app. The right approach depends on your use case:
- **@react-pdf/renderer** — best for structured docs like invoices and reports (define layout in JSX, runs server-side)
- **Puppeteer** — best for pixel-perfect HTML-to-PDF (renders a real browser, heavier but exact)
Which fits your needs? If unsure, I'll default to @react-pdf/renderer.
